phases.name: Setup & Foundation
phases.description: Initialize shadcn/ui, install deps, create layout, auth context, API client, theme provider, sidebar shell

phases.name: Auth Pages
phases.description: Login and register pages with form validation, JWT storage, protected route logic

phases.name: Dashboard
phases.description: Stats cards, recent activity feed, upcoming agenda, conversion summary

phases.name: Contacts Module
phases.description: Table with search/pagination, create/edit/delete dialogs, detail view with opportunities & activity timeline

phases.name: Pipeline Kanban
phases.description: Kanban board with drag-and-drop, opportunity detail modal, stage management

phases.name: Catalog Module
phases.description: CRUD tables for faculties, programs, cohorts with hierarchical filtering

phases.name: Agenda Calendar
phases.description: Monthly calendar view, create/edit event dialog, event list

phases.name: Campaigns, Activities, Notifications
phases.description: List pages with filters, read/unread for notifications, campaign create/edit

phases.name: Settings & Polish
phases.description: Profile page, change password, dark/light toggle, error boundaries, loading states

architecture: Next.js 14 App Router with (dashboard) route group for authenticated pages. Auth context provider wraps the app. Each module is a folder under src/components/ with its own page files in src/app/. API calls via fetch wrappers organized by domain in src/lib/api/. Shared components in src/components/ui/ (shadcn) and src/components/shared/.
